no: “08”, section: “水洗系列”, origin: “Ethiopia · Yirgacheffe”, process: “水洗”, processType: “washed”, name: “耶加雪菲 潔蒂普洽洽蕾 G1”, flavors: [“橙花乾香”,“砂糖橘”,“酸甜平衡”], halfLb: 440, hangTag: 350 }, { id: 9, no: “09”, section: “水洗系列”, origin: “Ethiopia · Guji Hambela”, process: “水洗”, processType: “washed”, name: “谷吉 罕貝拉”, flavors: [“佛手柑”,“糖漬橙片”,“格雷伯爵茶”], halfLb: 420, hangTag: 330 }, // Kenya & Brazil { id: 10, no: “10”, section: “肯亞 & 巴西”, origin: “Kenya · Kirinyaga”, process: “水洗”, processType: “washed”, name: “祈安布 凱瑞嘉”, flavors: [“蜜柚”,“青蘋果”,“洋甘菊”], halfLb: 440, hangTag: 350 }, { id: 11, no: “11”, section: “肯亞 & 巴西”, origin: “Brazil · Minas Gerais”, process: “日曬”, processType: “natural”, name: “巴烏莊園 維多莉亞農場 聖塔羅莎”, flavors: [“核果”,“堅果”,“榛果”,“奶油”], halfLb: 390, hangTag: 290 }, ]; const SECTIONS = [“藝妓 & 精品系列”, “日曬 & 特殊處理”, “水洗系列”, “肯亞 & 巴西”]; const PROCESS_COLORS = { natural: { bg: “#c45c3a”, label: “日曬” }, anaerobic: { bg: “#7B4EA6”, label: “厭氧日曬” }, washed: { bg: “#3A5A40”, label: “水洗” }, yeast: { bg: “#B8922A”, label: “酵母日曬” }, }; const ADMIN_PASSWORD = “safecoffee2026”; // ── Helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function formatDate(ts) { const d = new Date(ts); return d.toLocaleDateString(“zh-TW”) + “ “ + d.toLocaleTimeString(“zh-TW”, { hour: “2-digit”, minute: “2-digit” }); } function genOrderId() { return “SC” + Date.now().toString(36).toUpperCase(); } // ── Sub-components ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function ProcessBadge({ type }) { const c = PROCESS_COLORS[type] || PROCESS_COLORS.natural; return ( {c.label} ); } function BeanCard({ bean, cartItems, onAdd }) { const halfItem = cartItems.find(i => i.id === bean.id && i.type === “half”); const hangItem = cartItems.find(i => i.id === bean.id && i.type === “hang”); return (

``` ); } const qtyBtnStyle = { background: “#E8E2D6”, border: “none”, borderRadius: 4, width: 28, height: 28, fontSize: 16, cursor: “pointer”, color: “#1A1A14”, display: “flex”, alignItems: “center”, justifyContent: “center”, }; // ── Checkout Form ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function CheckoutForm({ cartItems, onSuccess, onBack }) { const [form, setForm] = useState({ name: “”, contact: “”, shipping: “home”, note: “” }); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false); const [error, setError] = useState(””); const total = cartItems.reduce((s, i) => s + i.price * i.qty, 0); const handleSubmit = async () => { if (!form.name.trim() || !form.contact.trim()) { setError(“請填寫姓名及聯絡方式”); return; } setLoading(true); setError(””); const order = { id: genOrderId(), timestamp: Date.now(), name: form.name.trim(), contact: form.contact.trim(), shipping: form.shipping, note: form.note.trim(), items: cartItems, total, status: “待確認”, }; try { const existing = await window.storage.get(“orders”).catch(() => null); const orders = existing ? JSON.parse(existing.value) : []; orders.push(order); await window.storage.set(“orders”, JSON.stringify(orders)); onSuccess(order); } catch (e) { setError(“儲存失敗，請再試一次”); } setLoading(false); }; return (
